question: Total Kills Over/Under 52.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between Amaru Gaming and Heroic in the PGL Wallachia: Americas Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 28 at 8:15PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 53 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: Amaru Gaming vs Heroic (BO3) - PGL Wallachia: Americas Closed Qualifier Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Amaru Gaming and Heroic in the PGL Wallachia: Americas Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 28 at 9:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Amaru Gaming" if Amaru Gaming win the match against Heroic.

This market will resolve to "Heroic" if Heroic win the match against Amaru Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 30, 10PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:

This market will resolve to "No" if Joel Embiid scores 29.5 points or fewer during the game.

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 50.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between Power Rangers and L1ga Team in the PGL Wallachia: Eastern Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 29 at 6:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 51 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: Power Rangers vs L1ga Team (BO3) - PGL Wallachia: Eastern Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Power Rangers and L1ga Team in the PGL Wallachia: Eastern Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 29 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Power Rangers" if Power Rangers win the match against L1ga Team.

This market will resolve to "L1ga Team" if L1ga Team win the match against Power Rangers.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Dota 2: GamerLegion vs Heroic (BO3) - PGL Wallachia: Americas Closed Qualifier Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between GamerLegion and Heroic in the PGL Wallachia: Americas Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 29 at 3:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "GamerLegion" if GamerLegion win the match against Heroic.

This market will resolve to "Heroic" if Heroic win the match against GamerLegion.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

This market refers to the tennis match between Ziga Sesko and Luis Miguel in the Australian Open Juniors, Boys, scheduled for January 30 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam statistics.
groupItemTitle: Australian Open Men's: Ziga Sesko vs Luis Miguel Total Sets: O/U 2.5

events.title: Australian Open Men's: Ziga Sesko vs Luis Miguel
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Ziga Sesko and Luis Miguel in the Australian Open Juniors, Boys, scheduled for January 29 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Sesko' if Ziga Sesko advances against Luis Miguel.

This market will resolve to 'Miguel' if Luis Miguel advances against Ziga Sesko.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Manchester City FC vs. Fulham FC: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Premier League game between Manchester City FC and Fulham FC, scheduled for February 11 at 2:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Manchester City FC and Fulham FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on premierleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

In the upcoming Premier League game between Chelsea FC and Leeds United FC, scheduled for February 10 at 2:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Chelsea FC and Leeds United FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on premierleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 45.5 in Game 3?
description:
In the upcoming match between Power Rangers and L1ga Team in the PGL Wallachia: Eastern Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 29 at 6:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 3.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 3 is 46 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 3 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: Dota 2: Power Rangers vs L1ga Team (BO3) - PGL Wallachia: Eastern Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Power Rangers and L1ga Team in the PGL Wallachia: Eastern Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 29 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Power Rangers" if Power Rangers win the match against L1ga Team.

This market will resolve to "L1ga Team" if L1ga Team win the match against Power Rangers.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 30, 1:00AM-1:15AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:
